hero.title: Erez
hero.subtitle: Legal excellence, real results
hero.desc: We guide individuals and businesses through the most complex legal challenges, with full commitment to your interests.

practices.title: Broad Expertise, Precise Representation
practices.desc: We offer comprehensive legal representation across a wide range of fields, with a personal and professional approach.

items.title: Employment Law
items.desc: Representing employees and employers in labor disputes, terminations, and collective agreements.

items.title: Commercial Law
items.desc: Supporting commercial transactions, mergers, acquisitions, and business contracts.

items.title: Real Estate
items.desc: Real estate transactions, contractor and developer support, and property taxation.

items.title: Family Law
items.desc: Divorce, prenuptial agreements, child custody, and inheritance law.

items.title: Litigation
items.desc: Court representation at all levels and management of complex legal proceedings.

items.title: Corporate Law
items.desc: Company formation, corporate governance, and founders' agreements.

about.title: Committed to Justice, Loyal to Clients
about.desc: Erez & Partners was founded on the belief that quality legal representation should be accessible, professional, and tailored to each client.

values.title: Uncompromising Professionalism
values.text: Every case receives the full attention and legal expertise built over many years.

values.title: Full Transparency
values.text: Clients are updated at every stage and know exactly what is happening with their case.

values.title: Proven Results
values.text: A long list of landmark rulings and successful transactions speaks for itself.

team.title: The Experts By Your Side
team.desc: Every attorney at our firm is a specialist in their field, with experience in some of Israel's most complex cases.

members.name: Adv. Erez
members.bio: 20 years of experience in commercial litigation and corporate law. Former Deputy District Attorney.

members.name: Adv. Maccabi
members.bio: Expert in employment law and commercial law. Guest lecturer at Tel Aviv University.

members.name: Adv. Dana
members.bio: Specializes in family law and real estate, with an empathetic and strategic approach.

members.name: Adv. Yuval
members.bio: Specializes in corporate and startup law. Has guided dozens of investment deals worth millions.

precedents.title: Precedents That Shaped the Law
precedents.desc: A selection of the firm's most significant rulings over the years.

items.title: CA 34521/23 — Wrongful Termination Damages
items.desc: A landmark ruling establishing enhanced damages violating the Equal Opportunity Law

items.title: CA 1892/22 — Asset Division in Partnership Dispute
items.desc: The District Court adopted the firm's position on valuing a company in a business dispute

items.title: FC 8821/21 — Real Estate Division in Divorce
items.desc: Innovative ruling on dividing an apartment registered before marriage

items.title: CA 5501/20 — Real Estate Deal Cancellation
items.desc: Achieved cancellation of a land deal based on misrepresentation, with full damages for the client

items.text: The firm guided me through an incredibly difficult divorce process. Their professional and human approach made me feel truly supported.
items.name: R. Mizrahi

items.text: As an early-stage startup, I needed a lawyer who understands the business world. Adv. Yuval was exactly that — fast, sharp, and practical.
items.name: D. Cohen

items.text: I was in a business dispute with a partner that dragged on for years. Within six months, we reached a settlement that exceeded my expectations.
items.name: A. Levy
